rulings.Case Title: STEVE RYAN VS. MITCHELL ROSENFELD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT SILKE FINIS's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings continued to July 24, 2020. Motion for Summary Judgement set for hearing for May 26, 2020 is also continued to July 24, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. PATRICK MOSSMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT TIANA MOSSMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required. By no later that 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff to provide competent evidence for the Court to consider in determination that immediate prosecution of this action is necessary to protect public health and safety. If evidence is not filed, the motion is continued to July 8, 2020. = (501/CFH)
